programme.title: God's Country Song
programme.desc: A charming but troubled country singer learns he has a 5-year-old son that he didn't know existed.

programme.title: Nothing Is Impossible
programme.desc: A high school janitor gets a second chance at both love and life when he tries out for an NBA team.

programme.title: Craft Me a Romance
programme.desc: The owner of an arts and crafts store is told she must sell her store or be forced out of business.

programme.title: Strong Fathers, Strong Daughters
programme.desc: A businessman struggles to give up control of his daughter and trust God with her future.

programme.title: The Engagement Plan
programme.desc: A man's engagement plans get upended when his girlfriend takes him to her family's farm instead.

programme.title: God's Country Song
programme.desc: A charming but troubled country singer learns he has a 5-year-old son that he didn't know existed.

programme.title: Nothing Is Impossible
programme.desc: A high school janitor gets a second chance at both love and life when he tries out for an NBA team.

programme.desc: A businessman struggles to give up control of his daughter and trust God with her future.

programme.title: Nothing Is Impossible
programme.desc: A high school janitor gets a second chance at both love and life when he tries out for an NBA team.

programme.title: Dream Wedding
programme.desc: When sisters Megan and Kate attend a local wedding fair, they enter for a dream wedding package.

programme.title: Grounded in Love
programme.desc: When a flight attendant loses her job, she returns to her grandma's farm to replant her roots.

programme.title: Romantic Rewrite
programme.desc: Ivy is a talented romance book editor who helps a stubborn mystery writer incorporate romance.

programme.title: An Unlikely Angel
programme.desc: Businesswoman Janie is falling apart at the thought of becoming a mom.

programme.title: Ainsley McGregor Mysteries: A Case for the Winemaker
programme.desc: Former criminologist Ainsley McGregor springs back into action when her friend is accused of murder.

programme.title: A Christmas Less Traveled
programme.desc: A woman embarks on a holiday journey to retrace her family's most memorable moments.

programme.title: Christmas on Candy Cane Lane
programme.desc: Ivy Donaldson struggles with her mom's shadow, Muriel, the Christmas darling of Icicle Falls.

programme.title: The Art of Christmas
programme.desc: Struggling artist Liv James accepts a teaching job at a local elementary school to make ends meet.

programme.title: Christmas Wreaths and Ribbons
programme.desc: A woman receives help from a neighbor when an injury puts her holiday wreath deliveries in jeopardy.
